title: Support dynamic array new with pattern assignment
body:
Good medium-starter task.

These [sv-tests](https://github.com/SymbiFlow/sv-tests) fail:

* generated/ivtest/br_gh164b.v
* generated/ivtest/br_gh164c.v
* generated/ivtest/br_gh164d.v
* generated/ivtest/br_gh164e.v

Steps to do:

1. Add to e.g. test_regress/t/t_dynarray.v:

   mema = new[4] ('{8'd1,8'd2,8'd3,8'd4});

2. Update V3Width and whatever else is needed to support these.  Perhaps the '{ needs to be a non-dynamic array which is made into an AstInitArray, then the new of the dynamic would input the non-dynamic previously inited array.
